source: alpha-researcher subagent grounded in FMP upstream docs snapshot + live-market-snapshot.json + server.ts 27-method catalog

prompts.prompt: What is NVIDIA Corporation's (NVDA) earnings surprise history over the last 8 quarters — show actual vs estimated EPS and revenue, the surprise delta for each, and whether NVDA beat or missed each quarter?
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_earnings mode=surprises symbol=NVDA -> /stable/earnings returns date, actualEarningResult (epsActual), epsEstimated, revenueActual, revenueEstimated, surpriseDelta; beat/miss derived from sign of surpriseDelta.

prompts.prompt: Pull Johnson & Johnson's (JNJ) full dividend history with ex-dividend, record, and payment dates, and tell me the next scheduled ex-dividend date from the dividend calendar.
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_dividends mode=history symbol=JNJ -> /stable/dividends returns date, dividend, recordDate, paymentDate, declarationDate; get_dividends mode=calendar -> /stable/dividends-calendar returns next ex-dividend date for JNJ.

prompts.prompt: List Exxon Mobil Corporation's (XOM) most recent insider transactions — filer name, transaction type (purchase or sale), securities traded, and reported value — and summarize whether insiders are net buyers or sellers.
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_insider_activity symbol=XOM -> /stable/insider-trading/search?symbol=XOM returns filer/ownerName, transactionType (P-Purchase/S-Sale), securities (shares), value; net flow computed by summing value by type.

prompts.prompt: Over the next 14 days, what major US macro events are scheduled — specifically any FOMC, CPI, or Employment Situation releases — and what is the current US Treasury yield curve across maturities?
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_macro_calendar from=today to=today+14d -> /stable/economic-calendar returns event, date, country, importance (filter for FOMC/CPI/Employment Situation) and /stable/treasury-rates returns yields by maturity (1M...30Y).

prompts.prompt: Show a chart comparing 1-day, 5-day, 1-month, and YTD performance across all 11 GICS sectors, with the Technology sector and the Semiconductors industry highlighted, alongside their average P/E ratios.
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_sector_performance -> /stable/sector-performance-snapshot + /stable/industry-performance-snapshot (performance 1D/5D/1M/YTD) and /stable/sector-pe-snapshot + /stable/industry-pe-snapshot (PE); filter rows for Technology sector and Semiconductors industry.

prompts.prompt: For Eli Lilly and Company (LLY), report the Altman Z-score, Piotroski F-score, Beneish M-score, and the current FMP rating, and interpret whether LLY signals distress or quality.
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_quality_scores symbol=LLY -> /stable/financial-scores returns altmanZScore, piotroskiScore, beneishMScore, workingCapital, etc. and /stable/ratings-snapshot returns the FMP rating grade; distress thresholds applied to Z and M scores.

prompts.prompt: Chart Apple Inc.'s (AAPL) revenue split by geography and by product line for the most recent fiscal year, and compare it to the prior year to show which segment is growing or shrinking.
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_revenue_segments segment=both symbol=AAPL -> /stable/revenue-geographic-segmentation (revenue by region/date) and /stable/revenue-product-segmentation (revenue by product line/date); YoY delta computed across the two most recent periods.

prompts.prompt: Which US senators and House representatives have traded Meta Platforms (META) recently? List each trade with chamber, politician, transaction date, buy/sell direction, and reported amount range.
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_congressional_trades symbol=META chamber=both -> /stable/house-trades and /stable/senate-trades filtered to symbol=META, returning representative/senator, transactionDate, type (buy/sell), amount range, chamber.

prompts.prompt: For Tesla, Inc. (TSLA), report the FMP DCF fair value vs the current stock price, the EV/EBITDA and EV/Sales multiples, market cap, and the 1-week / 1-month / 3-month / YTD / 1-year price changes in one valuation table.
Who are the top institutional holders of JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM) from the latest 13F filing, what are the free-float and shares-outstanding figures, and what filing period do the holders reflect?
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_ownership symbol=JPM -> /stable/shares-float (freeFloat, floatShares, outstandingShares) + /stable/profile (CIK) + /stable/institutional-ownership/dates (latest filing period) + /stable/institutional-ownership/extract-analytics/holder (top holders, shares, value, pctHeld).

prompts.prompt: Plot Amazon.com, Inc.'s (AMZN) annual revenue, EBITDA, and free cash flow growth rates over the last 8 years as a multi-line chart, and identify whether growth is accelerating or decelerating.
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_growth symbol=AMZN period=annual limit=8 -> /stable/financial-growth returns growthRevenue, growthEBITDA, growthFreeCashFlow, growthEPS by period; acceleration = second derivative of the growth series.

prompts.prompt: What SEC filings has Costco Wholesale Corporation (COST) submitted in the last 120 days, and identify any 10-K annual reports or 8-K material events among them with their filing dates and document links?
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_sec_filings symbol=COST (no type filter, default 120-day window) -> /stable/sec-filings-search/symbol returns formType, filingDate, link, finalLink; client filters rows for formType 10-K and 8-K.

prompts.prompt: From the S&P 500 (^GSPC) constituent list, which companies are classified in the Semiconductors industry? List each with its symbol, company name, and sub-industry, ranked.
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_index_constituents index=sp500 -> /stable/sp500-constituent returns symbol, name, sector, subSector per member; filter rows where sector/subSector matches Semiconductors.

prompts.prompt: Build a relative-value ranking of NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) against its FMP peer group: for NVDA and each peer, pull DCF upside vs current price and EV/EBITDA, then plot the group sorted from cheapest to most expensive on DCF upside.
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_peers symbol=NVDA -> /stable/stock-peers returns peer symbols; then per peer get_valuation -> /stable/discounted-cash-flow (dcfPrice, stockPrice -> upside = (dcfPrice-stockPrice)/stockPrice) and /stable/enterprise-values (evOverEBITDA); rank the combined set.

prompts.prompt: For Tesla, Inc. (TSLA), combine three signals into one read: (a) the last 8 quarters of earnings surprise deltas, (b) recent insider purchase vs sale activity, and (c) recent House and Senate congressional trades — are the three signals converging bullish or diverging?
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_earnings mode=surprises symbol=TSLA -> /stable/earnings (surpriseDelta series); get_insider_activity symbol=TSLA -> /stable/insider-trading/search (net P vs S); get_congressional_trades symbol=TSLA chamber=both -> /stable/house-trades + /stable/senate-trades (buy/sell direction); convergence read synthesized from the three.

prompts.prompt: Compare the Energy and Technology sectors' 1-month and YTD performance and P/E from the sector snapshot, then screen for large-cap Energy stocks and pull the DCF fair value vs current price for Exxon Mobil (XOM) as the sector's bellwether — is Energy's rotation supported by valuation?
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_sector_performance -> /stable/sector-performance-snapshot + /stable/sector-pe-snapshot (Energy vs Technology rows); screen_stocks sector=Energy marketCapMoreThan -> /stable/company-screener; get_valuation symbol=XOM -> /stable/discounted-cash-flow (dcfPrice vs stockPrice).

prompts.prompt: Build an investment-thesis view for Apple Inc. (AAPL) in one pass: top 13F institutional holders and float, Altman Z / Piotroski / Beneish scores, and DCF fair value vs current price — is institutional ownership supported by quality and intrinsic value?
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_ownership symbol=AAPL -> /stable/shares-float + 13F holder chain; get_quality_scores symbol=AAPL -> /stable/financial-scores (altmanZScore, piotroskiScore, beneishMScore); get_valuation symbol=AAPL -> /stable/discounted-cash-flow (dcfPrice vs stockPrice).

prompts.prompt: Overlay the next 14 days of US macro events (FOMC, CPI, Employment Situation) and the Treasury yield curve against the earnings-calendar report dates for large-cap names, so I can see which macro catalysts cluster in the same week as major earnings.
prompts.answerabilityNote: get_macro_calendar from=today to=today+14d -> /stable/economic-calendar (FOMC/CPI/Employment Situation) + /stable/treasury-rates (yield curve); get_earnings mode=calendar same window -> /stable/earnings-calendar returns symbol + report date; overlay by date.
